dax.parametergroup.Description.Description: A description of the parameter group.

dax.parametergroup.ParameterGroupName.Description: The name of the parameter group.

dax.parametergroup.ParameterNameValues.Description: An array of name-value pairs for the parameters in the group. Each element in the array represents a single parameter.   `record-ttl-millis` and `query-ttl-millis` are the only supported parameter names. For more details, see [Configuring TTL Settings](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazondynamodb/latest/developerguide/DAX.cluster-management.html#DAX.cluster-management.custom-settings.ttl).
